title: Map Sum Pairs
input_format: A series of function calls to `insert` and `sum`.
output_format: The sum of all values whose keys match the prefix.
constraints:
- `1 <= key.length, prefix.length <= 50`
- `key` and `prefix` consist of only lowercase English letters.
- `1 <= val <= 1000`
- At most `50` calls will be made to `insert` and `sum`.
function_signature: class MapSum { constructor() {} insert(key: string, val: number): void {} sum(prefix: string): number {} }
